title: Spring Batch Job Parameters
description: Job parameters uniquely identify a job instance in Spring Batch 5.1. Parameters are typed (string, long, double, date) and can be identifying or non-identifying.

JobParameter.title: Job Parameter
JobParameter.description: A single typed job parameter value. Spring Batch 5.1 supports STRING, LONG, DOUBLE, and DATE parameter types.

value.description: The parameter value (serialized as string regardless of type).

type.description: The Java type of this parameter.

identifying.description: Whether this parameter contributes to uniquely identifying a job instance. Non-identifying parameters do not affect the job instance identity.
